Name: Broken Prototype

Recommended Roles: Attack Marksman or Fighter

Name: Cyclonic Slicers
Description: Gain 3 orbiting razors. Razors deal ? magic damage, and 30% Shred and Sunder enemies for 4 seconds. Deal 10% increased damage to Shredded or Sundered enemies. Damage increases based on Stage. Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Fighter

Name: Deep Freeze
Description: The first time you fall below 90%, 60%, 40%, and 20% health, gain a 20% max health shield for 4 seconds. When this happens, release a frost nova that stuns enemies within 2 hexes for 2 seconds and deals magic damage equal to 15% of their max Health. The radius increases by 1 each nova. Recommended Roles: Attack or Magic Tank

Name: Echoing Batblades
Description: Every 3 attacks, fire 10 batblades split between the 3 nearest enemies. Each blade deals 50% physical damage. Recommended Role: Attack Marksman

Name: Evolved Embershot
Description: For every 15 mana spent, fire a projectile at a nearby enemy dealing ? + 50% of the holder's Ability Power magic damage, and applying 1% Burn and 33% Wound to enemies for 10 seconds. Each projectile leaves a lingering field that deals ? magic damage to enemies each second. Damage increases based on Stage. Burn: Deals a percent of the target's max Health as true damage every second Wound: Reduces healing received Recommended Roles: Magic Caster

Name: Guiding Hex
Description: Every 3 seconds, fire a bolt at a random enemy in Attack Range, dealing ? magic damage. Aurora Bonus: If this item is equipped on Aurora, she gains 9 Ability Power when the bolt hits. Damage increases based on Stage.

Name: Anima Emblem
Description: The holder gains the Anima trait.

Name: Anomaly
Description: Evolve the holder, granting an effect based on their role. Tank: Gain 1100 health and grow in size. Marksman: Gain 60% Attack Speed. On cast, knock back their target if within 3 hexes of them. Fighter/Assassin: Gain 30 Ability Power & 30% Attack Damage. Triple it when below 85% Health. Caster: For every 50 Mana spent, throw a 2-hex fireball that deals 6% max Health true damage, 33% Wounds, and 1% Burns for 5 seconds. Specialist: Gain 6 stars that orbit this champion. Each star deals 85 magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the champion's current target.

Name: Crown of Demacia
Description: If the holder is a Tank, regenerate 3-21% maximum Health every 2 seconds (based on stage). Otherwise, gain 10% Attack Damage and Ability Power every 2 seconds instead. If the holder of this item dies, you instantly lose the fight. You can remove this item by benching the holder.

Name: Psionic Emblem
Description: The holder gains the Psionic trait.

Name: Sniper Emblem
Description: he holder gains the Sniper trait and +1 Attack Range.

Name: Champion Duplicator
Description: Use on a champion to create a 1-star copy on your bench. Consumable - This item disappears when used.

Name: Lesser Champion Duplicator
Description: Use on a 3-cost champion or less to create a 1-star copy on your bench. Consumable - This item disappears when used.

Name: Magnetic Remover
Description: Use on a champion to unequip all items. Cannot be used on champions in combat.

Name: Reforger
Description: Unequip all items and randomly transform them into new ones of a similar type and quality. Consumable - This item disappears when used.

Name: Aegis of Dawn
Description: Every 2.5 seconds, steal 3 Armor from enemies within 1-hex and heal % of the holder's Armor. If Aegis of Dusk is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every 1.25 seconds instead. Healing increases based on Stage.

Name: Aegis of Dusk
Description: Every 2.5 seconds, steal 3 Magic Resist from enemies within 1 hex and deal % of the holder's Magic Resist as magic damage. If Aegis of Dawn is also equipped, trigger this item's effect every 1.25 seconds instead. Damage increases based on Stage.

Name: Ahri's Aura
Description: The holder is orbited by 3 foxfires. Each one deals 55 (Ability power) magic damage and the orbit expands to hit the holder's current target. For every 20 Mana the holder spends, foxfires travel 5% faster for the rest of combat.

Name: Blighting Jewel
Description: Dealing magic damage reduces the target's Magic Resist by 4. If their Magic Resist is 0, grant the holder 2 Mana instead. Ability damage can only trigger on each enemy once every 0.5 seconds.

Name: Cappa Juice
Description: The holder dons a Hat on each takedown. The holder gains 1% Attack Damage and Ability Power per Hat. On death lose 20% of all Hats.

Name: Dawncore
Description: Reduce the holder's max Mana by 10. Subsequent spellcasts reduce max Mana by 10%, to a minimum of 10.

Name: Deathfire Grasp
Description: Combat start: Blast the current target for 40% of their max Health as magic damage. Repeat this every 13 seconds.

Name: Death's Defiance
Description: 50% of the damage the holder receives is instead dealt over 4 seconds as non-lethal damage. Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Ekko's Patience
Description: Total Ability damage is increased by 45%, but is dealt over 2 seconds instead.

Name: Eternal Pact
Description: Combat start: Form a pact with the highest Health allied champion, if they die, gain 10 Mana regen and 40% Ability Power. When the ally uses their ability, gain 15 Mana. Every 6 seconds, shield your ally for 200% of the holder's Ability Power.

Name: Evelynn's Instinct
Description: When switching targets, blink to the next target. Attacks and Abilities execute the holder's target below 12% of their Health. Kills grant the holder 50% Attack Speed decaying over 3 seconds.

Name: Fishbones
Description: The holder's attacks target random enemies.

Name: Flickerblade
Description: Attacks grant 5% stacking Attack Speed. Every 3 attacks also grant 2% Attack Damage and 2% Ability Power.

Name: Gambler's Blade
Description: Grant 1% bonus Attack Speed per gold in your bank (up to 30 gold). Each attack has a 6% chance to drop 1 gold. Gold generated this game: Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Gold Collector
Description: Attacks and Abilities execute enemies below 12% of their maximum Health. Executions have a 33% chance to drop 1 gold. Gold Collected: g Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Hellfire Hatchet
Description: Attacks deal 3% of the holder's max Health as bonus physical damage. For every 1% missing Health, gain 1% Attack Speed.

Name: Horizon Focus
Description: [DISABLED] Stunning an enemy causes lightning to strike them, dealing 30% of their max Health as magic damage.

Name: Hullcrusher
Description: Combat Start: If there are no adjacent allies, gain 400 Health, 10% Attack Damage, and 10% Ability Power.

Name: Indomitable Gauntlet
Description: The holder's Move Speed is drastically reduced. Gain 15% max Health, stun immunity, and pull the current target into melee range.

Name: Infinity Force
Description: Tons of EVERYTHING!

Name: Innervating Locket
Description: The holder gains 1% of their total Mana whenever they're hit by an attack. Each cast restores 20% of the holder's max Health over 3 seconds.

Name: Kayle's Exaltation
Description: After 18 seconds of combat, this and all completed items on the holder become Radiant.

Name: Kayle's Radiant Exaltation
Description: Behold, the righteous flame!

Name: Lesser Mirrored Persona
Description: Share 15% of the holder's bonus Attack Damage, Ability Power, Attack Speed, Armor, Magic Resist, and Health with other Mirrored Persona holders. Can't be Reforged Unique: one per champion

Name: Lich Bane
Description: The holder's first attack after each Ability cast deals bonus magic damage. Damage increases based on Stage.

Name: Lightshield Crest
Description: Every 3 seconds, Shields the lowest percent Health ally for 70% of the holder's combined Armor and Magic Resist for 5 seconds. On death grants this shield to all allies.

Name: Luden's Tempest
Description: 100% of overkill damage plus 100 is dealt as magic damage to the three enemies nearest the target.

Name: Manazane
Description: After casting the first time in combat, gain 100 Mana over 5 seconds. Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Mending Echoes
Description: Increase healing on the holder by 25%. When the holder gives or receives a heal, grant 40% of the heals value to the lowest health ally as well.

Name: Mirrored Persona
Description: Every 6 player combats gain a lesser copy of Mirrored Persona (/6). Share 15% of the holder's bonus Attack Damage, Ability Power, Attack Speed, Armor, Magic Resist, and Health with other Mirrored Persona holders. Can't be Reforged, Lesser copies do not produce copies. Unique: one per champion

Name: Mittens
Description: Shrinks the holder, granting them increased movement speed and immunity to Slow, Burn, and Wound.

Name: Mogul's Mail
Description: Grants 1 Armor, 1 Magic Resist, and 8 Health when taking damage, stacking up to 35 times. At full stacks, grant 1 gold and continue gaining 1 gold every 11 seconds.

Name: Prowler's Claw
Description: After killing a target, shed negative effects and dash to the farthest target within 4 hexes. The next 2 critical attacks deal 50% bonus Critical Strike Damage.

Name: Rapid Firecannon
Description: Gain +1 Attack Range, increased by 1 whenever the holder kills an enemy.

Name: Shadow Puppet
Description: Spawn a clone that copies the holder's items. The clone has 60% max Health and deals 40% damage. Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Silvermere Dawn
Description: Grants immunity to Stuns and the holder's attacks Stun the target for 0.8 seconds. The holder's Attack Speed is locked at 0.5.

Name: Sniper's Focus
Description: Gain 40% Damage Amp against targets 4 or more hexes away.

Name: Soraka's Miracle
Description: The first 2 times the holder drops below 50% Health, a Miracle occurs, healing them for 20% of their max Health. If the holder survives player combat, gain 1 player Health for each Miracle this combat.

Name: Spectral Cutlass
Description: Combat start: Teleport the holder to the mirrored hex on the enemy's side of the board. After 8 seconds, the holder returns to their original location.

Name: Statikk Shiv
Description: Every 3rd attack deals 30 + 50% of the holder's Ability Power as additional magic damage to 4 enemies.

Name: Suspicious Trench Coat
Description: Once per combat at 60% Health, the holder splits into 3 copies of themself each with 33% of their max Health. Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Talisman Of Ascension
Description: After 22 seconds gain 100% max Health and 120% Damage Amp for the rest of combat.

Name: The Darkin Aegis
Description: The holder gains the Darkin trait. Every second, deal 1% of the holder's max Health as magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes. When units die in the area, heal for 2% max Health.

Name: The Darkin Bow
Description: The holder gains the Darkin trait. Every 10 attacks, fire an arrow that passes through the current target, dealing 500% Basic Attack Damage as physical damage, reduced by 33% per enemy hit.

Name: The Darkin Scythe
Description: The holder gains the Darkin trait. Every 4 seconds, slash adjacent enemies for 150% Basic Attack Damage as physical damage. On takedown or when the holder dashes, slash again. Dash Cooldown: 1.5 second

Name: The Darkin Staff
Description: The holder gains the Darkin trait. For every 20 Mana spent, launch a tendril at enemies near the current target, dealing magic damage. Damage increases based on Stage

Name: Thresh's Lantern
Description: After 6 seconds of combat, pull the leftmost benched unit onto the battlefield. While that unit lives, 20% of all damage the holder would take is redirected to them. Traits of champions flung onto the board do not become active

Name: Titanic Hydra
Description: Attacks deal 4% of the holder's max Health plus 8% of their Attack Damage as bonus physical damage to the target and adjacent enemies.

Name: Trickster's Glass
Description: Summon a clone with 70% base Health and +10% max Mana. You cannot equip items to the clone. The clone benefits from active traits. Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Unending Despair
Description: Whenever a Shield on the holder breaks, 150% of that Shield's initial value is dealt to the nearest enemy as magic damage.

Name: Varus's Obsession
Description: Combat Start: Your strongest Tank becomes the Soulmate. For each second they are alive, the holder gains 3% stacking Attack Damage and Ability Power. The Soulmate heals for 20% of damage the holder deals.

Name: Void Gauntlet
Description: Combat start: Store 30% max Health and 2.5% more every second. On death, unleash the stored Health as magic damage split between enemies within 4-hexes. Unique - only 1 per champion

Name: Wit's End
Description: Attacks deal bonus magic damage. Heals the holder for 30% of all magic damage dealt. Damage increases based on Stage.

Name: Yasuo's Bladework
Description: Every 3.5 seconds, your next attack is a double attack.

Name: Zhonya's Paradox
Description: Once per combat at 40% Health, become invulnerable and untargetable for 3 seconds. Unique - only 1 per champion
